title: PreventPotions
description: PreventPotions is a lightweight Minecraft Paper plugin that lets server owners disable potion use and effects in different forms. It works out of the box with default settings, while still allowing full customization through config.yml.
body:
This plugin gives you fine control over how potions affect your server. You can block specific potion actions such as:

- Drinking potions (prevent players from consuming them)

- Splash potions (stop players from throwing them)

- Lingering potions (disable lingering area effects)

- Tipped arrows (block potion-tipped arrows from firing)

- Beacon effects (prevent beacons from applying potion effects)

- Commands (cancel potion effects applied via commands)

Each prevention can be toggled individually in the config, and every blocked action sends a configurable message to the player.

Commands:

- /preventpotions reload
this reloads the config file without having to restart the server.
- /preventpotions toggle
this enables/disables the plugin
